description: You are an industrial automation engineer designing a robotic workcell to palletize 25kg cardboard boxes. A Webots simulation world is loaded with a palletizing robot, but the robot's wrist link is missing its pneumatic end-effector. Add a VacuumGripper device node to the robot's 'WRIST_LINK' Solid node to simulate a Piab pneumatic suction array. Configure the VacuumGripper with the following properties: translation [0 0 0.05], name 'piab_array', isOn TRUE, tensileStrength 480, shearStrength 240, and contactMaterial 'piab_rubber'. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/palletizer_gripper.wbt.
